text:
All our updates from the track and field of day eight at the Summer Games including Julien Alfred’s women’s 100m gold.

This page is now closed. Thanks for joining us. These were the updates as from the eighth day of the Paris Games where Julien Alfred stole the headlines on the track and field with gold in the women’s 100m final on Saturday, August 3:
